productDisplayName: Doodle Kids Boy Printed Blue Shorts
description: Composition Blue and white printed shorts that have two side pockets, two back pockets, pin tucks above the hem on either sides, a buttoned and zipped closure and loops on the waist Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations His cuteness level will be off the chart when you dress your little boy in these shorts from doodle. Team this with a T-shirt and sandals, and let your little one play in comfort.
